zh.Rotherfield Greys, Henley on Thames, Oxf: 英國奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯
zh.Somerton, Bicester, Oxfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾索莫頓
zh.Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England: 英國奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Grey於1246年1月5日出生在英國奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯時，他的父親Walter de Grey24歲，母親Isabel Dunston22歲。他於大約1265年與Joan de Valoines在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1295年5月27日在他的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯。

zh-hans.Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England: 英国奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Grey于1246年1月5日出生在英国奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯时，他的父亲Walter de Grey24岁，母亲Isabel Dunston22岁。他于大约1265年与Joan de Valoines在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1295年5月27日在他的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Grey was born on 5 January 1246, in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Walter de Grey, was 24 and his mother, Isabel Dunston, was 22. He married Joan de Valoines about 1265, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 27 May 1295, in his hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Grey est né le 5 janvier 1246, à Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter de Grey, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Isabel Dunston, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Valoines environ 1265, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 27 mai 1295, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Grey am 5. Januar 1246 in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter de Grey 24 und seine Mutter Isabel Dunston 22. Er hat um 1265 in England, United Kingdom Joan de Valoines geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 27. Mai 1295 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Grey è nato il il 5 gennaio 1246 nel Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Walter de Grey, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Dunston, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Valoines circa 1265, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 27 maggio 1295, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Greyが1246年1月5日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアロスエルフィールド グレイズで生まれた時，父Walter de Greyは24歳，母Isabel Dunstonは22歳であった。約1265年にイギリスイギリスでJoan de Valoinesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1295年5月27日に故郷で49歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアロスエルフィールド グレイズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Grey(이)가 1246년 1월 5일 영국 스퍼드실르 로더필드 그리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Grey(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Dunston(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1265년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Joan de Valoines(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1295년 5월 27일 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 로더필드 그리스에 묻혔다.

pt.5 January 1246–27 May 1295: 5 de janeiro de 1246–27 de maio de 1295
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Grey nasceu em 5 de janeiro de 1246, em Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter de Grey, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Dunston, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Valoines aproximadamente 1265, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 27 de maio de 1295, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Grey родился 5 января 1246 г. в местности ротирфиелд грис, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter de Grey было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Dunston, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Valoines около 1265 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 27 мая 1295 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности ротирфиелд грис, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.5 January 1246–27 May 1295: 5 de enero de 1246–27 de mayo de 1295
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Grey nació el 5 de enero de 1246, en Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter de Grey, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Isabel Dunston, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Joan de Valoines aproximadamente 1265, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 27 de mayo de 1295, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
